sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from optimal f using stable distribution parameters (A, B, V). Formula uses complex number Z with parameter-dependent calculation: Z = 1 - i*B*(U/ABS(U))*tan(A*π/2) when A≠1; Z = 1 + i*B*(U/ABS(U))*2/π*ln(ABS(U)) when A=1. Constraints: 0<A≤2, -1≤B≤1, V≥0. Specific optimal_f fraction not numerically specified in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Position sizing is determined using a mathematical formula involving optimal f parameters constrained by limits on distribution parameters A, B, and V.
